title: Nested cast_embed with embeds_many — inner schema required per item
prompt: Build MyApp.Orders.Order with embeds_many :line_items, LineItem. Each LineItem has required fields :product_name, :unit_price (decimal), :quantity (integer). Both order and line item have their own changeset functions. Order's changeset validates that there is at least one line item. Write both modules to lib/my_app/orders/order.ex.
tier_rationale: Synthesis of embeds_many + nested changeset + :decimal fields. Hard because per-item validation is easy to forget.
